title: Viners Everyday Knife Block Set of 5 Pieces; Chef, Bread, Carving, Utility & Paring Knives, Black, Stainless Steel, ‎0305.190
features: STAINLESS STEEL KNIVES | This set of kitchen knives has everything you need for your kitchen and food preparation. Each knife stores safely, easily and proudly on display in the stylish, compact knife block with a clear acrylic side.
CONTENTS | This set includes one chef's knife, one bread knife, one carving knife, one utility knife, one paring knife, and the knife block. The knives have soft touch handles for a comfortable grip.

DURABILITY | The set comes with quality stainless steel blades, rust-resistant and tempered to keep their sharp edges for longer while chopping, slicing and cutting. Knives are hand wash only and the block can easily be wiped down.

EVERYDAY RANGE | The Everyday range is the most versatile of our ranges. Find all the kitchenware you need from our selection of products ranging from cutlery to knife sets, pans, and utensils. The knife block set has a 5-year guarantee.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust kitchenware that comes with up to 50-year guarantee.
description: From the manufacturer Everyday 4pc Carving Set Everyday Set of 6 Steak Knives Everyday 3pc Knife Set with Peeler Everyday Set of 2 Scissors Everyday Cheese Board Gift Set Everyday 5pc Stainless Steel Utensil & Pot Set Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 20 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.9 out of 5 stars 14 4.0 out of 5 stars 10 3.9 out of 5 stars 10 Price — no data £12.46 £ 12 . 46 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £7.00 £ 7 . 00 — no data £16.18 £ 16 . 18 Description This set features an 8” carving knife and 6”carving fork. You can cut cooked meats, roasts and thin slices of poultry on a steady pine carving board. The set features a sharpening rod to help keep your knife sharp to ensure cutting with ease. These knives effortlessly cut all meats. Crafted from quality stainless steel and non-stick coating, the serrated blades provide strength and durability. The curved handle, soft-touch handles provide maximum comfort and added grip. The 4 piece set offers 2 paring knives, 1 santoku knife and a straight peeler. Each handle is finished with a soft touch coating, ergonomically designed for maximum comfort and grip when in use. Cut your meat, vegetables, herbs and food packaging with our Everyday scissors. Set contains 10” and 8” scissors. This Cheese Set is crafted from strong stainless steel, finished with beautiful wooden handles. Each individual cheese tool is designed bespoke, meeting your need for all types of cheese. This 5 piece utensil set offers a solid spoon, slotted spoon, ladle, skimmer and slotted turner. All utensils are beautifully finished with brushed stainless steel with a matching storage pot. Stainless Steel ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Dishwasher Friendly no data ✓ ✓ no data no data ✓
